description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart featuring two large spoked wheels mounted on either side of a flat, rectangular load platform. The cart's frame is constructed from thick wooden beams, with two long handles extending from the front for manual pushing or pulling. The wheels are robust and appear to be crafted from the same wood as the rest of the cart, with visible grain and weathering. The load platform is solid and unadorned, suitable for carrying goods or materials. There are no side rails or barriers, making it easy to load and unload items. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian design, likely used for transporting items in urban or rural settings.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels and a flat, open load platform, featuring long handles for manual operation.
description_view_0: Side view showing both large spoked wheels and the full length of the flat wooden platform with extended handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open end of the platform and the parallel handles extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wheels and the length of the cart from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back of the platform and the two wheels on either side.
